title: Raw GSC Truth Normalization Report

policy.rule: All official KPIs use RAW GSC API data only. No multiplication, correction, or estimation in official metrics.
policy.source: GSC Search Analytics API — page dimension, rowLimit=500

what_changed.after: KPIs use raw API numbers (499 impressions)
what_changed.comparison_note: Manual GSC UI comparison (e.g., Qasem's 436 check) listed separately as FYI only

allowed_displays: GSC API raw impressions/clicks/CTR/position/pages — OFFICIAL KPI
Manual GSC UI comparison — FYI only, clearly separated
Correction factor reference — documentation only, not applied
prohibited: Mixing API and UI values in same KPI field
